overall.description: A static scenic view from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a cyberpunk city waterfront with dense colorful slum structures along a murky river contrasting against futuristic glass corporate skyscrapers in the background. The camera remains stationary on an elevated vantage point under a clear blue sky with industrial smoke rising from distant stacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk waterfront slum district with corporate skyline backdrop

agents.ego_description: standing still on an elevated vantage point overlooking the river and cityscape

entered.detail: large red metal bridge structure spanning the river on the left side
brownish water filling the foreground and center of the frame
dense cluster of makeshift buildings with colorful roofs and walls along the right bank
futuristic high-rise skyscrapers with glass facades and spires dominating the background
white smoke rising from smokestacks among the distant buildings

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view from an elevated position overlooking a murky river in a cyberpunk city. Dense colorful slum structures line the right bank while futuristic corporate towers rise in the background. A red girder bridge spans the left side of the frame, and industrial smoke drifts from distant stacks under a clear blue sky. No movement or action occurs in the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, elevated panoramic view of a cyberpunk city where industrial decay contrasts with futuristic corporate ambition. It begins by overlooking a murky river, with the camera capturing the dense, colorful slum structures that line the right bank. The perspective then expands to reveal towering glass corporate skyscrapers rising in the background under a clear blue sky. This vista is framed by a red girder bridge on the left, while industrial smoke drifts steadily from distant stacks to complete the urban landscape.
